spells.name: Bolt Directive I
spells.summary: A licensed bolt. Thin, white, exact.
spells.line: A thin white bolt files itself against the target.

spells.name: Mending Writ I
spells.summary: Sanctioned repair of minor tissue damage.
spells.line: Regulation stitches of pale light close the smallest wounds first.

spells.name: Warding Form I
spells.summary: A licensed screen against physical harm.
spells.line: A gray lattice settles over you, dull as paperwork and half as forgiving.

spells.name: Binding Writ I
spells.line: The charter reads the target its obligations; its feet agree to stay.

spells.name: Aperture Writ I
spells.summary: Tier-1 unlocking of licensed municipal locks. Target the lock first.
spells.line: The lock hears an order it was built to obey.

spells.name: Census Glass I
spells.summary: Reads a subject's registered condition and allegiance.
spells.line: A pane of cold glass holds the subject's particulars for one long moment.

spells.name: Lumen Edict I
spells.summary: A licensed light. Steady, white, unromantic.
spells.line: A licensed light switches itself on above your shoulder: steady, white, unromantic.
